parameters.query: SELECT 'trip' as _type, t.* FROM trips t WHERE status = 'active' AND start_date >= CURRENT_DATE UNION ALL SELECT 'recurring' as _type, NULL, re.title, NULL, re.start_date::text, re.end_date::text, re.status::text, NULL, NULL, NULL, re.notes, re.created_at::text, re.updated_at::text FROM recurring_events re WHERE status = 'active' AND start_date <= CURRENT_DATE + 1 AND end_date >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT * FROM trips WHERE status = 'active' AND start_date >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT * FROM recurring_events WHERE status = 'active' AND start_date <= CURRENT_DATE + 30 AND end_date >= CURRENT_DATE

=INSERT INTO digest_log (trip_count, recurring_count, maintenance_count, success) VALUES ({{ $('Build HTML Email').item.json.trip_count }}, {{ $('Build HTML Email').item.json.recurring_count }}, {{ $('Build HTML Email').item.json.maintenance_count }}, true)
